[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101101001 6
1 1001010000 3
2 1110000111 6
3 1100111101 7
4 1101100101 6
5 0110000000 2
6 0001010100 3
7 1000000001 2

23 32 1000001101 4

70 07 1001010110 5
